content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT]
( 
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AccountCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AccountClass] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AccountDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[Type] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[IsCashAccount] [bit]  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
